# BP-104 positive variant: Handle repeats a literal path pattern.
lang: go
file: BP-104-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func routes() {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.Handle("/health", http.HandlerFunc(health))
	mux.Handle("/health", http.HandlerFunc(health))
}

func health(http.ResponseWriter, *http.Request) {}
